name: A Note For Yourself
description: You spot a loose brick within a pillar that catches your eye.

choices.option: [Take and Give] Receive and Store a Card.

name: Ancient Writing
description:
Scaling the city, you notice a wall covered in the writing of Ancients. As you try to wrap your head around what the puzzling symbols and glyphs could mean, the writing begins to glow. 
 Suddenly, the message becomes clear...

choices.option: [Elegance] Remove a card from your deck.

name: Augmenter
description:
A man with an eyepatch and a devilish grin strides up to you. 
 "Hey there, stranger. Interested in advancing science? I can make you stronger than any training or blessing. You're gonna need it if you're one of those heroes with a death wish." 
 
 "Whad'ya say?"

name: Big Fish
description:
As you make your way down a long corridor you see a banana, a donut, and a box floating about. No... upon closer inspection they are tied to strings coming from holes in the ceiling. There is a quiet cackling from above as you approach the objects. 
 What do you do?

choices.option: [Box] Obtain a Relic. Become Cursed - Regret.

name: Bonfire Spirits
description: You happen upon a group of what looks like purple fire spirits dancing around a large bonfire.

choices.option: [Offer] Receive a reward based on the offer.

name: Council of Ghosts
description:
As you continue your ascent, thick black smoke begins to billow out of the ground and walls around you, coalescing into three masked forms that start to speak. 
 
 "Another puppet of Neow I think." 
 "AGREED! SHE ALWAYS MAKES THE FUNNEST TOYS!" 
 
 You notice an over-sized grin as the third addresses you. 
 "Ignore the others... Would you like a taste of our power?"

name: Cursed Tome
description:
In an abandoned temple, you find a giant book, open, riddled with cryptic writings. 
 
 As you try to interpret the elaborate script, it begins to shift and morph into writing you are familiar with.

name: Dead Adventurer
description: While searching the adventurer you are caught off guard!

name: Designer In-Spire
description:
You discover a colorful shop with the banner "IN-SPIRE" and walk in to see what's inside. 
 "No, no way. Nope. Can't let you in!" 
 
 A man with ridiculous clothing appears at the entrance to bar you.

choices.option: [Clean Up] Lose 60 Gold. Remove a card.
[Full Service] Lose 90 Gold. Remove a card and upgrade a card.

name: Duplicator
description: Before you lies a decorated altar to some ancient entity.

choices.option: [Pray] Duplicate a card in your deck.

name: Face Trader
description:
You walk by an eerie statue holding several masks... 
 Something behind you softly whispers, 
 "Stop."

name: Falling
description:
As you head upwards hopping from one floating shape to another, you slip. 
 
 You begin to fall.

name: Forgotten Altar
description:
In front of you sits an altar to a forgotten god. 
 Atop the altar sits an ornate female statue with arms outstretched. 
 She calls out to you, demanding sacrifice.

name: Golden Idol
description:
You come across an inconspicuous pedestal with a shining gold idol sitting peacefully atop. It looks incredibly valuable. 
 
 You sure don't see any traps nearby.

choices.option: [Run] Gain the Golden Idol. Take 25% Max HP damage.

name: Golden Shrine
description: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to an ancient spirit.

name: Knowing Skull
description: You find yourself in an old, decorated chamber. In the center of the room, a large skull sits atop an ornate pedestal. As you approach, the skull bursts into flames and turns to face you.

choices.option: [Success?] Get a Colorless Card. Lose HP.
[A Pick Me Up?] Get a Potion. Lose HP.

name: Lab
description:
You find yourself in a room filled with racks of test tubes, beakers, flasks, forceps, pinch clamps, stirring rods, tongs, goggles, funnels, pipets, cylinders, condensers, and even a rare spiral tube of glass. 
 
 Why do you know the name of all these tools? It doesn't matter, you take a look around.

name: Living Wall
description:
As you come to a dead-end and begin to turn around, walls slam down from the ceiling, trapping you! 
 
 Three faces materialize from the walls and speak. 
 "Forget what you know, and I'll let you go." 
 "I require change to see a new space." 
 "If you want to pass me, then you must grow."

choices.option: [Forget] Remove a card from your deck.
[Change] Transform a card in your deck.
[Grow] Upgrade a card in your deck.

name: Masked Bandits
description:
Hehehe.. Thanks for the gold! 
 Oh, I love gold. It's so nice. 
 shiny shiny chits they are!

name: Match and Keep!
description:
" Twelve cards! Match them to keep them! Five tries, no do-overs. 
 Are you ready? Let's start!"

name: Mind Bloom
description:
While walking and traversing through the chaos of the Spire, your thoughts suddenly begin to feel very... real... 
 
 Imaginings of monsters and riches begin to manifest themselves into reality. 
 The sensation is quickly fleeting. What do you do?

choices.option: [I am War] Fight a Boss from Act 1. Obtain a Rare Relic.
[I am Rich] Gain 999 Gold. Cursed - 2 Normality.
[I am Healthy] Heal to full HP. Cursed - Doubt.
[I am Awake] Upgrade all Cards. You can no longer heal.

name: Mushrooms
description:
You give in to the unnatural desire to eat. As you consume mushroom after mushroom, you feel yourself entering into a daze and pass out. As you awake, you feel very odd. 
 You Heal 25% of your HP, but you also get infected.

name: Mysterious Sphere
description:
Jutting from the chaotic terrain around you, a bony sphere surrounds a mysterious glowing object within. 
 While you are curious what lies inside, you notice some sentries keeping an eye on it.

name: N'loth
description:
An odd creature with a hunched back sprouting several tentacles is scrounging through a pile of trash and debris in front of you. As you approach, he shuffles towards you in a non-threatening manner. 
 "N'loth hungry. Feed N'loth."

choices.option: Exchange a Relic for a special reward.

name: Old Beggar
description: An old beggar cloaked in fur reaches his hands out towards you as you pass. "Spare some coin, child?"

choices.option: [Offer Gold] 75 Gold: Remove a card from your deck.

name: Ominous Forge
description: You duck into a small hut. Inside, you find what appears to be a forge. The smithing tools are covered with dust, yet a fire roars inside the furnace. You feel on edge...

choices.option: [Forge] Upgrade a card in your deck.
[Rummage] Obtain a special Relic. Become Cursed - Pain.

name: Pleading Vagrant
description:
While sneaking past a group of shrouded figures, one of them approaches you. 
 "Got anything for me friend? Please... maybe some Coin?" 
 "I just need somewhere to stay, I have treasures I can trade..." 
 He seems delusional, but harmless.

choices.option: [Rob] Obtain a Relic. Become Cursed - Shame.

name: Purifier
description: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.

choices.option: [Pray] Remove a card from your deck.

name: Scrap Ooze
description: As you walk into the room you hear a gurgling and the grinding of metals. Before you is a slime-like creature that ate too much scrap for its own good. From the center of the creature you see glints of strange light, perhaps something magical? It looks like you can get some treasure if you just reach inside its... opening. However, the acid and sharp objects may hurt.

choices.option: [Reach Inside] Take damage. Chance to find a Relic.

name: Secret Portal
description:
Before you is a sight that seems out of place in the alien landscape around you. Strangely placed into one of the living walls of the Beyond is an enclosed stone entrance filled with a swirling magical portal. 
 
 You aren't sure where it leads, but maybe it could speed your journey through the Spire.

choices.option: [Enter the Portal] IMMEDIATELY travel to the boss.

name: Sensory Stone
description: Navigating through the Beyond, you discover a glowing tesseract spinning and shifting gently in the air.

choices.option: [Recall (1)] Add 1 Colorless card to your deck.
[Recall (2)] Add 2 Colorless cards to your deck. Lose HP.
[Recall (3)] Add 3 Colorless cards to your deck. Lose HP.

name: Shining Light
description:
You find a shimmering mass of light encompassing the center of the room. 
 
 Its warm glow and enchanting patterns invite you in.

choices.option: [Enter] Upgrade 2 random cards. Take 20% Max HP damage.

name: Spire Heart
description:
tu-thump ... tu-thump ... tu-thump ... 
 A deep pulsing dread can be felt throughout the room... 
 Is this the heart of the Spire? The source of this evil?

name: The Cleric
description:
A strange blue humanoid with a golden helm(?) approaches you with a huge smile. 
 "Hello friend! I am Cleric! Are you interested in my services?!" the creature shouts, loudly.

choices.option: [Purify] 50 Gold: Remove a card from your deck.

name: The Colosseum
description:
Thwack!!! 
 .. 
 ...... 
 ... 
 You were knocked unconscious...

choices.option: [VICTORY] A powerful fight with many rewards.

name: The Divine Fountain
description: You come across shimmering water flowing endlessly from a fountain on a nearby wall.

choices.option: [Drink] Remove all Curses from your deck.

name: The Joust
description:
As you make your way through the large buildings you come across a long narrow bridge and spot knights on either side, facing one another. You approach... 
 "Halt!" 
 
 A knight forcefully gestures you to stop with its giant lance.

name: The Library
description:
You come across an ornate building which appears abandoned. 
 A plaque that has been torn free from a wall is on the floor. It reads, "THE LIBRARY". 
 Inside, you find countless rows of scrolls, manuscripts, and books. 
 You pick one and cozy yourself into a chair for some quiet time.

choices.option: [Read] Choose 1 of 20 cards to add to your deck.

name: The Mausoleum
description:
Venturing through a series of tombs, you are faced with a large sarcophagus studded with gems in the center of a circular room. 
 You cannot make out the writing on the coffin, however, you do notice black fog seeping out from the sides.

choices.option: [Open Coffin] Obtain a Relic. 50%: Become Cursed - Writhe.

name: The Moai Head
description:
You stumble across something that feels *very* out of place. Before you, an enormous stony head emerges from a large wall segment that does not shift and change like the rest of this area. 
 The head's mouth is wide open, and it reveals large intimidating teeth stained red with blood. The surface of the statue is riddled with pictographs that seem to indicate people throwing themselves into the mouth of this head and being devoured. Why would anyone do that?

choices.option: [Jump Inside] Heal to full HP. Lose Max HP.
[Offer: Golden Idol] Gain 333 Gold. Lose Golden Idol.

name: The Nest
description:
A long line of hooded figures can be seen entering 
 an unassuming cathedral.

choices.option: [Smash and Grab] Gain 99 Gold. Obtain Ritual Dagger. Fight Nests.

name: The Ssssserpent
description:
You walk into a room to find a large hole in the ground. As you approach the hole, an enormous serpent creature appears from within. 
 
 "Ho hooo! Hello hello! what have we got here? Hello adventurer, I ask a simple question. 
 The most fulfilling of lives is that in which you can buy anything! 
 Do you agree?"

name: The Woman in Blue
description:
From the darkness, an arm pulls you into a small shop. As your eyes adjust, you see a pale woman in sharp clothes gesturing towards a wall of potions. 
 "Buy a potion. Now!" she states.

choices.option: [Buy 1 Potion] Lose 20 Gold. Obtain a Potion.

name: Tomb of Lord Red Mask
description: A highly ornamented tomb can be seen on the other side of a floating path. Upon reaching the tomb, you notice a slot for gold coins with a scratched out inscription above it.

choices.option: [Offer: Gold] Lose all Gold. Obtain a Relic.

name: Transmogrifier
description: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.

name: Upgrade Shrine
description: Before you lies an elaborate shrine to a forgotten spirit.

name: Vampires(?)
description:
Navigating an unlit street, you come across several hooded figures in the midst of some dark ritual. As you approach, they turn to you in eerie unison. The tallest among them bares fanged teeth and extends a long, pale hand towards you. 
 "Join us brother, and feel the warmth of the Spire."

choices.option: [Accept] Remove all Strikes. Receive 5 Bites. Lose 30% Max HP.

name: We Meet Again!
description:
"We meet again!" 
 A cheery disheveled fellow approaches you gleefully. You do not know this man. 
 
 "It's me, Ranwid! Have any goods for me today? The usual? A fella like me can't make it alone, you know?" 
 You eye him suspiciously and consider your options...

choices.option: [Give Potion] Lose a Potion. Obtain a Relic.
[Give Gold] Lose Gold. Obtain a Relic.
[Give Card] Lose a Card. Obtain a Relic.

name: Wheel of Change
description:
You come upon a dapper looking, cheery gremlin. 
 "It's time to spin the wheel! Are you R E A D Y ? Of course you are!"

name: Winding Halls
description:
As you slowly make your way up the twisting pathways, you constantly find yourself losing your way as the walls and ground seem to inexplicably shift before your eyes. 
 
 The constant whispering voices in the back of your head aren't helping things either.

name: Wing Statue
description:
Among the stone and boulders, you notice an intricate large blue statue resembling a wing. 
 You find gold spilling from its cracks. Maybe there is more inside...

choices.option: [Pray] Remove a card from your deck. Lose 25% HP.

name: World of Goop
description:
You fall into a puddle. 
 IT'S MADE OF SLIME GOOP!! 
 Frantically, you claw yourself out over several minutes as you feel the goop starting to burn. 
 You can feel goop in your ears, goop in your nose, goop everywhere. 
 
 Climbing out, you notice that some of your gold is missing. Looking back to the puddle you see your missing coins combined with gold from unfortunate adventurers mixed together in the puddle.
